# CodeFryDev

> This is a platform where we learn, work on experimental projects, play games, come up with innovative ideas, and build many more...

## About
CodeFryDev offers free online tools, games, and AI apps—no signup required. We build productivity apps, AI-powered utilities, engaging games, and creative design resources for developers, designers, and anyone curious to experiment in the browser. Active since 2023.

## Website
- URL: https://codefrydev.in/
- Built with: Hugo static site generator
- Language: English (en-US)
- Full documentation: https://codefrydev.in/llms-full.txt

## Main Sections
- Home (/): Categorized tools and resources across five browse categories
- Browse (/browse/): All tools organized by category
- About us (/about-us): Mission, team, and contributors (alias: /about)
- AI (/ai): Free AI-powered tools—memes, summarizers, chat, visual notes
- Games (/games): Browser games—Wordle, Snake, Chain Reaction, and more
- Design Lab (/designlab): Creative design tools, visualizers, and resources
- Store (/store): Mobile apps on Google Play
- History (/history): Project timeline and milestones
- CFDDC (/cfddc/): CodeFryDev Developer Conference—year-by-year announcements
- Search (/search): Site-wide search for tools, games, and AI apps
- Press (/press/): Media kit, boilerplate, and logo assets
- Terms, Privacy & Contact (/tncprivacy): Policies and contact information

## Browse Categories
1. **Creative & Assets** (/browse/creative-assets/): Muraly, SVG Engine, 3D Printer, ESP32CAM, fonts, DSA learning, wallpapers, 3D models, text tools, and more
2. **Tools & Utilities** (/browse/tools-utilities/): JSON Playground, JS LIDE, Web SEO, Prompt Library, CSV, meta tags, weather, tier lists, and more
3. **Games & Fun** (/browse/games-fun/): Wordle, Snake, Chain Reaction, WordDice, 2048, Ludo, Carrom, Overdose, and more
4. **Site & External Links** (/browse/site-links/): About, timeline, CFDDC, store, privacy, and external education links
5. **Containers & Packages** (/browse/containers-packages/): Website Profiling Docker image, @codefrydev/svg-engine on npm

## AI Tools (featured)
- AI SocialSnap: https://socialsnap.codefrydev.in/
- AI Meme Generator: https://meme.codefrydev.in/
- Visual Note AI: https://appsuit.codefrydev.in/apps/visualnoteai/
- Aqua Tracker AI: https://aquatrack.codefrydev.in/
- AI Web Summarize: https://summarize.codefrydev.in/
- Profile AI: /ProfiledAi/
- CFD Chat AI: https://chat.codefrydev.in/

## Highlights
- 100% free — most tools need no signup
- Runs in your browser — no install required
- Privacy-focused — most tools process data locally
- Cookie consent banner for analytics (Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity) — user can accept or decline

## Optional
- Sitemap: https://codefrydev.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://codefrydev.in/robots.txt

Last Updated: May 2026
